stories: Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the twenty-eighth of April, 2026
Venus rotates so slowly that a single Venusian day stretches across about two hundred and forty-three Earth days, while the planet loops around the Sun in just two hundred and twenty-five
So on Venus, one day is genuinely longer than one year, and on top of that, it spins backwards, so the Sun rises in the west and sets in the east
A planet where time, in a real sense, runs sideways
Looking at your Saskatoon Tuesday, it's a cleaner one than yesterday
One quick bookend, then deep work for the rest of the day
And on a lighter note, Changi Airport and the National Arts Council are kicking off a new partnership from later this year to bring live arts performances and installations into the terminals
The world's nicest airport leaning even further into theatre
Good morning Sean, it's Monday, the twenty-seventh of April, 2026
Here's a strange one to kick off the week
Despite spending most of their lives in water, hippos can't actually swim
Their bones are so dense they're barely buoyant, so what looks like graceful swimming is really a slow-motion gallop along the riverbed, pushing off the bottom in long bounds
So next time you see one cruising serenely across a river, remember they're walking
Looking at your Saskatoon Monday, it's a properly meaty one
You kick off with a morning run from seven to eight, then ten hours of Big Rock Time from eight thirty through six thirty
A late finish, but a focused middle of the day
Good morning Sean, it's Sunday, the twenty-sixth of April, 2026
Here's a quietly amazing one to start the day
A typical fluffy white cloud, the kind drifting overhead on any given afternoon, weighs roughly a million tonnes
Its density is only about half a percent lower than the air around it, and that tiny difference is what keeps a million tonnes of water vapour suspended above your head
Worth a glance up next time you step outside
Looking at your day, it's a properly relaxed one
The calendar is clear all morning, and then you've got Sunday Lunch from one until six over at 1014 Aird Street
Plenty of runway either side for coffee, a walk, or whatever the weekend feels like asking of you
